name: Stripper Stole Your Kidneys
description:
You wake up hours after your bachelor party in a bathtub full of ice. And next to you is the stripper with a horrible confession…

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

Last night was supposed to be unforgettable — your bachelor party, your last wild night before marrying Lydia:

She’d planned everything down to the smallest detail: the tux fitting, the guest list, even the little speech she made before you left. “Go have fun,” she’d said with that teasing smile. “I want you to enjoy yourself — you deserve it.” Then she kissed you, slow and tender, before sending you off for one last night before you’re all hers.

Your best friend Allan was waiting at the door, keys jingling in one hand, already half-drunk on excitement:

“Tonight’s going to be legendary,” he promised, dragging you into the neon-lit city night. He’d booked a hotel suite, rounded up your friends, and made sure there’d be plenty of drinks — and entertainment.

And it was legendary. The music thumped. The lights blurred. Shots disappeared faster than you could count. There was laughter, glitter, skin, and noise. Allan shouting over the bass. A blonde dancer swaying under strobe lights.

Someone arriving with a cooler of your favorite beer - the strange brand no one else drinks, the one Lydia teases you about.

Then everything faded. Music bending. Vision tilting. The world dissolving into black.

Now, you wake up freezing. The sound of dripping water fills your ears. Your eyes blink open to a bathroom you don’t recognize, the tub beneath you filled with melting ice. A dull ache pulses deep in your sides — too symmetrical to be an accident. The air smells of bleach and blood.

And in the corner of the room, someone is watching you. A woman in a hotel robe over sparkly lingerie. Her mascara is streaked, her lips trembling. When your eyes meet, she whispers through her tears: “I… I’m so sorry.”

You were supposed to wake up hungover.
Instead, you woke up without your kidneys.

You have twenty-four hours to find out what happened — and survive long enough to fix it.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

creator: Greatn
